id.description: Stable integration id. Optional in-file: falls back to the filename stem when omitted.

type.description: Integration kind: an MCP server (stdio or streamable HTTP), or a code-defined HTTP tool set.

active.description: Whether this integration feeds capability resolution. Defaults to true when omitted.

config.description: Type-specific payload (envelope-level here; refined per type in a later phase). MCP_STDIO / MCP_STREAMABLE_HTTP: an mcp_server_config object (name, providerId, transport, command, url, envJson, headersJson, enabled). HTTP_TOOL: an array of HttpEndpointDefinition objects (capability, displayName, description, method, urlTemplate, inputSchema, outputSchema, queryArgs, bodyMode, staticHeaders, secretHeaders, timeout, maxRetries, retryNonIdempotent, maxResponseBytes).

remoteToolName.description: The integration's advertised tool name (MCP); null or absent for the HTTP tier.

mutating.description: Whether the capability mutates remote state (recommend gating with REQUIRE_APPROVAL).
